page_content:
### **5. Dr. Vijay Vaidyanathan (The Department Head)**  
**Subject:** Medical School Application & Update: Arian Moridani  
Hi Dr. Vaidyanathan,  
Hope you’re doing well! I often think back to your courses and how much they shaped my perspective on engineering excellence — especially the way you emphasized real-world impact over just theory.  
I wanted to share a quick update: while I did consider going for a PhD at UNT, I ended up pursuing an **M.S. in Computer Science (Machine Learning)** at Georgia Tech instead. My goal now is to become a physician who can help implement AI and big data solutions directly into healthcare — combining the industrial insights from your classes with real patient care.  
I’d really value your support on this medical school application, especially since you’ve always encouraged me to think about how engineering applies beyond the lab, through your industry insights.  
To make things easy for you: I’ve set up an Interfolio account so all my applications receive one upload — just a single file from you.
I’ve attached my updated CV, and some supporting documents showing how I’m applying these skills today in Big Data for Health and Computer Vision.**  
Thanks again for being such a strong voice in my academic journey.  
Warmly,
Arian Moridani  
---
